stories.headline: Claude Cowork Expands to Mobile and Web
stories.blurb: Anthropic's persistent agent thread now works outside the desktop app, letting tasks continue while the laptop is closed—signaling a shift toward async, cloud-based knowledge work agents.

stories.headline: Slackbot Evolves Into an Agentic Execution Hub
stories.blurb: Salesforce transformed Slackbot into a conversational control layer that can pull CRM data, generate charts, and trigger workflows, moving enterprise chat beyond simple queries toward full business process automation.

stories.headline: GPT-Live Enables Simultaneous Voice Conversations
stories.blurb: OpenAI's new voice model allows ChatGPT to listen and speak simultaneously, dramatically improving the natural flow of interruptions, turn-taking, and live translation in voice interactions.

stories.headline: Google Cloud Hosts Gemini Locally in India
stories.blurb: Google brings Gemini Flash and Enterprise onto Indian infrastructure to satisfy strict AI residency requirements for regulated industries, marking a major step in the globalization of sovereign AI compute.

stories.headline: Hugging Face Models Land on Microsoft Foundry
stories.blurb: Open-source and custom AI weights can now be deployed on Microsoft's enterprise-grade Foundry Managed Compute, lowering the bar for running HF models in production on Azure.

stories.headline: AI Makes Security Harder by Accelerating Existing Weaknesses
stories.blurb: A structural analysis argues AI doesn't introduce entirely new threats but acts as a force multiplier for engineering chaos, experimentation entitlement, and technical debt in enterprise security.

stories.headline: 78% of Enterprises Report AI-Related Security Incidents
stories.blurb: A DigiCert survey reveals most AI security issues stem from unauthorized or misconfigured agents rather than AI-generated code, highlighting a critical governance gap as organizations rush AI adoption.

stories.headline: AI Supercharges Service Desk Social Engineering Attacks
stories.blurb: Attackers exploit AI for personalized, scalable voice and video impersonation during onboarding and password resets, demanding stronger identity verification beyond agent judgment.

stories.headline: PyPI Trusted Publishing Doesn't Mean Safer Packages
stories.blurb: Security experts warn that Trusted Publishing only authenticates CI/CD identities, not code quality, meaning malicious actors can still easily upload vulnerable packages through the mechanism.

stories.headline: Iceberg v3's Variant Type Solves the JSON-in-a-String Problem
stories.blurb: Apache Iceberg's new Variant type shreds semi-structured payloads into real Parquet columns, enabling high-performance analytics on telemetry and events without rigid schema migrations.

stories.headline: HubSpot Details Its 20-Billion-Vector Retrieval Platform
stories.blurb: HubSpot shares the operational playbook for its production vector infrastructure, using Kubernetes operators to automate cluster management across 200+ indexes and 140+ clusters.

stories.headline: DataFusion Runs Billion-Edge Graphs on a Laptop
stories.blurb: Apache DataFusion demonstrates it can compute PageRank and connected components on billion-edge graphs using under 10GB of RAM through disk-backed scans and spill-aware execution.

stories.headline: Apache Hudi Adds Native Vector Search to the Lakehouse
stories.blurb: Hudi integrates HNSW-based vector indexing and hybrid search directly into the lakehouse, allowing teams to run RAG and semantic search on existing tables without a separate vector database.

stories.headline: AI-Ready Data Becomes the Primary Competitive Moat
stories.blurb: The bottleneck for enterprise AI is shifting from model access to data quality, making messy, ungoverned data the critical barrier to moving from AI experiments to production factories.

stories.headline: Semantic Layers Outrank Agents as the True Bottleneck
stories.blurb: A curated semantic layer provides the governed business context that turns AI intent into reliable queries, making the models and definitions within it more critical than the agent framework itself.
